meta.sanctions_scale: -3 = actively helping evade, -2 = significant evasion, -1 = mild evasion, 0 = neutral, 1 = light sanctions, 2 = heavy sanctions, 3 = maximum sanctions
meta.notes: Only non-zero pairs listed. All unlisted pairs default to 0. Tariffs are directional (row imposes on column). Sanctions are directional (row sanctions column).

sanctions._description: Sanctions imposed BY row ON column. Negative values = evasion/support for target.
